target: That voice just now... a child!?
The shadow's presence is close too! Shinpei, hold onto me!!
Oh my, you're so energetic. You'll make a good meal...
I failed to take one down! ...Shinpei!!
(Look at the big picture, look at the big picture, the body in human form is an illusion! The shadow's main body is the shadow cast at their feet!)
(Relax my body, just like I was taught. The power distribution is '3 in the right hand, 7 in the left'--)
...You've grown so big... Shinpei-kun... Have you... been well...?
Ushio, you came back? Even though your funeral was yesterday...
So basically, the bad shadows and good shadows are fighting... And Ushio is a good shadow?
Rest assured! We'll defeat aaaaaall the bad shadows!!
Wait, how long are you going to stay up in the tree!?
I... I can't get down!!! You're the one who carried me up here!
Can't be helped. Here, grab on.
Shinpei really gets led around by the nose.
Ushio's presence has disappeared... I'm glad I was finally able to erase that little girl...
(The gun... is gone... I see... because Ushio disappeared...)
By the way, since you just came back, Shinpei, you're... on the edge of a cliff, aren't you...?
(The event horizon...!! The absolute limit right after a loop! This is bad!!)
(Aiming for this!! Were you watching me the whole time as a bird!?)
(This is bad... By myself, I can't even defeat a single Stray...)
I-It's okay, Akari. I'll... protect you!!
(Don't give up!!!! If I die, it all ends!! Look at the big picture! Look at the big picture!!)
(Something! There has to be something!! A way to get out of this situation...!!)
...C-Could you tell me just one thing?
You too... Can carry over the copied data... Right...!?
You didn't eat the people in the shrine grounds... on the night of the 24th, did you...
The power that returned at that time... I ended up using it to chase you...
(No, did Haine stop them? But why...)
W-We've escaped the crisis... Is that what this means?
(They vanished... the Strays too... Why was I saved...?)
Yes... the situation has changed...!! Let's gather once... yes... We need to rethink our strategy...
Damn it!! It won't connect...!! It's out of range... here...!!
How about the northeast of the island... <color=#GF_TIPS_047>Torashima</color>?
That small island you can only reach during low tide?
Yes. Low tide is in exactly 30 minutes.
I told Mio and Sou too... We'll head there after returning to Kofune and meeting up.
...Understood. Then let's meet at Torashima in 30 minutes.
Yes... well then, Sensei... In 30 minutes...
Let's go down the mountain immediately...!! It's dangerous here!
(I have to let everyone know... That Ushio... Ushio has disappeared...!!)
Haine. When did you copy that body again?
You should look at the big picture and think about it too... The loophole in their pseudo-loop that isn't in Ushio's memories...
I won't let Shinpei's life reach tomorrow's ritual. I'll have you make a move, Shide.
Listen up!? This is a top secret operation. You must not tell the adults!
Uwooooh!! Understooood!!! This is kinda amazing!!
...I really couldn't bring myself to say... that the real Bucchi had been killed...
That's fine... no need to scare them.
I wonder if those kids can keep quiet about the shadows...
It's fine, no one would believe them anyway.
The ground there... there's blood on it! It's still fresh!!
...There was a murder here... Was it the doing of that shadow from earlier... Bucchi...
It's fine, I'm just going to 'read' it a little...
...34 years old... female... Not someone from this island... A tourist... living in Osaka, huh.
From the looks of it, there's no human-shaped stain. That tourist was carried away...
Damn it...!! Haine is eating more people than usual in order to heal her wounds from yesterday...
You idiot... Eating more strangers won't heal her...
Shiori Kobayakawa, and Hoine Minakata too... Their originals are no longer in this world, after all...
...Huh? Wait, did I just say something?
No... wait a sec, it's from Nagumo-sensei! Let's meet up with everyone once as planned.
